---
title: Column extents
---

```{=typst}
#rect(width: 100%, height: 0.7cm, fill: rgb("#dde"), inset: 6pt)[#raw(".column-body") (default)]
```

::: {.column-margin}
```{=typst}
#rect(width: 100%, height: 0.7cm, fill: rgb("#fcd"), inset: 6pt)[#raw(".column-margin")]
```
:::

::: {.column-body-outset}
```{=typst}
#rect(width: 100%, height: 0.7cm, fill: rgb("#dfd"), inset: 6pt)[#raw(".column-body-outset")]
```
:::

::: {.column-body-outset-left}
```{=typst}
#rect(width: 100%, height: 0.7cm, fill: rgb("#dfd"), inset: 6pt)[#raw(".column-body-outset-left")]
```
:::

::: {.column-body-outset-right}
```{=typst}
#rect(width: 100%, height: 0.7cm, fill: rgb("#dfd"), inset: 6pt)[#raw(".column-body-outset-right")]
```
:::

::: {.column-page-inset}
```{=typst}
#rect(width: 100%, height: 0.7cm, fill: rgb("#fed"), inset: 6pt)[#raw(".column-page-inset")]
```
:::

::: {.column-page-inset-left}
```{=typst}
#rect(width: 100%, height: 0.7cm, fill: rgb("#fed"), inset: 6pt)[#raw(".column-page-inset-left")]
```
:::

::: {.column-page-inset-right}
```{=typst}
#rect(width: 100%, height: 0.7cm, fill: rgb("#fed"), inset: 6pt)[#raw(".column-page-inset-right")]
```
:::

::: {.column-page}
```{=typst}
#rect(width: 100%, height: 0.7cm, fill: rgb("#cdf"), inset: 6pt)[#raw(".column-page")]
```
:::

::: {.column-page-left}
```{=typst}
#rect(width: 100%, height: 0.7cm, fill: rgb("#cdf"), inset: 6pt)[#raw(".column-page-left")]
```
:::

::: {.column-page-right}
```{=typst}
#rect(width: 100%, height: 0.7cm, fill: rgb("#cdf"), inset: 6pt)[#raw(".column-page-right")]
```
:::
